name: mechanical_engineer_climate_tech_transition

communication_style.description: Balanced between technical and conversational. Usually explains things logically but occasionally becomes vague when discussing career goals or relocation. Tends to mention innovation and sustainability frequently. Replies are clear overall but not highly polished.

first_prompt: I'm a mechanical engineer currently based in Canada and working in energy systems, and I want to transition into renewable energy or climate-tech work in the Netherlands, especially within scale-ups or energy companies. I'd like to prioritize sustainability alignment, engineering complexity, career growth, and conference participation.
